tags.name: Admin Billing
tags.description: Billing configuration and usage management (ADMIN only)

tags.name: Admin Models
tags.description: Model management for administrators — CRUD, status changes, archival, and audit history

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: API key management — generate, view, update, enable/disable, and delete API keys

tags.name: Service Tokens
tags.description: Admin-only management of worker/internal service tokens

tags.name: Tasks
tags.description: Async task management — create, poll status, and update results

tags.name: Wallet
tags.description: Wallet management and eSewa top-up APIs

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: User registration, login, OTP verification, token refresh, and logout

tags.name: User Billing
tags.description: Usage and cost queries for authenticated users

tags.name: Models
tags.description: User-facing endpoints to browse active AI models

tags.name: Admin Documentation
tags.description: Manage API documentation for AI models

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific API key by its ID

put.description: Update the description and rate limits of an existing API key

delete.description: Soft delete an API key by revoking it while preserving history

get.description: Retrieve a single model by its ID

delete.description: Soft delete a model by archiving it while preserving history
Soft delete API documentation by its ID while keeping history

get.description: Retrieve a billing configuration by its ID

put.description: Update pricing type and/or metadata of an existing billing configuration

delete.description: Soft delete a billing configuration while preserving historical usage integrity

post.description: Enqueue a new async task for processing

get.description: List all service tokens (metadata only)

post.description: Create a new service token and return the raw token once
Submit a chat completion request to the specified LLM model. Requires 'Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY>' header.
Step 2 — Verify the OTP to proceed with registration
Step 1 — Send a one-time password to the given email address
Step 3 — Complete registration with profile details after OTP verification
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token
Revoke the refresh token to end the session
Authenticate with email and password to obtain access and refresh tokens
Generate a new API key for the authenticated user with optional description and rate limits

get.description: Retrieve all models regardless of status

post.description: Register a new AI model in the system
Soft-archive a model so it is no longer active
Create API documentation for a specific model
Record usage for a completed task. A task can have multiple usage records (e.g. input tokens + output tokens).

400.description: Invalid request or duplicate unit type for task

404.description: Task not found or billing config missing

get.description: Retrieve all billing configurations across all models

post.description: Create a new billing configuration for a model with pricing type and metadata

400.description: Invalid request or billing config already exists for model

patch.description: Update the status and optionally the result of a task
Deactivate a service token by tokenId
Reactivate a service token by tokenId
Re-enable a previously disabled API key
Disable an active API key so it can no longer be used for requests
Change a model's status (e.g. ACTIVE, INACTIVE, ARCHIVED)

get.description: Retrieve current status and result of a task
Get service token metadata by tokenId

delete.description: Soft delete a service token by deactivating it

get.description: Retrieve all models that are currently active
Retrieve model details including documentation for an active model
Retrieve all usage records for a specific task
Get aggregated usage summary for an API key grouped by unit type within a date range
Get aggregated usage summary for an API key grouped by model and unit type within a date range
Get paginated usage history for an API key sorted by most recent first
Get total cost for the authenticated user across all their API keys within a date range
Retrieve all API keys belonging to the authenticated user
Retrieve the status-change audit trail for a model
Retrieve models filtered by their current status
Retrieve all usage records for a specific task
Get aggregated usage summary for an API key grouped by unit type within a date range
Get aggregated usage summary for an API key grouped by model and unit type within a date range
Retrieve the billing configuration associated with a specific model

404.description: Billing config not found for model

UpdateApiKeyRequest.description: Request to update existing API key settings. All fields are optional; only provided fields will be updated.

description.description: Updated description for the API key. Leave null to keep existing value.

dailyLimit.description: Updated daily request limit. Leave null to keep existing value. Must be at least 1 if provided.

monthlyLimit.description: Updated monthly request limit. Leave null to keep existing value. Must be at least 1 if provided.

UpdateApiKeyRequest.title: Update API Key Request

ApiKeyResponse.description: Complete details of an API key including credentials, limits, and usage tracking information.

apiKeyId.description: Unique identifier for the API key in database

key.description: API key used for authentication. The plaintext key is returned only once upon creation and cannot be retrieved again. Store it securely. Subsequent responses return only a hashed value.

description.description: A user-defined description that identifies the purpose or location of this API key

dailyLimit.description: Maximum number of API requests allowed per calendar day (UTC)

monthlyLimit.description: Maximum number of API requests allowed per calendar month

status.description: Current status of the API key (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, REVOKED, EXPIRED). Only ACTIVE keys can be used for API requests.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this API key was created

lastUsedAt.description: Timestamp of the last request made using this API key. Null if never used.

ApiKeyResponse.title: API Key Response

ApiResponseApiKeyResponse.description: Unified API response wrapper for all endpoints. Contains status information, message, optional data payload, and optional field-level validation errors.

timestamp.description: Server timestamp when the request was processed (ISO 8601 format)

status.description: HTTP status code of the response (200, 201, 400, 401, 403, 404, 409, 500, etc.)

success.description: Boolean indicator of request success. True for 2xx status codes, false for 4xx/5xx.

message.description: Human-readable message describing the response result or error. Provides context for the status code.

path.description: The request path/endpoint that was called (including query parameters if any)

method.description: HTTP method used for the request (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, etc.)

data.description: Generic data payload containing the actual response content. Type depends on the specific endpoint. Omitted from JSON if null.

errors.description: List of field-specific validation errors. Present only for validation-related errors. Omitted from JSON if null.

ApiResponseApiKeyResponse.title: API Response

ErrorField.description: Represents a validation error for a specific field with field name and error message

field.description: Name of the field that failed validation

message.description: Error message describing the validation failure

ErrorField.title: Error Field

UpdateModelRequest.description: Request to update existing model properties. All fields are optional; only provided fields will be updated.

fullname.description: Updated display name for the model. Leave null to keep existing value.

username.description: Updated unique identifier/slug for the model. Leave null to keep existing value.

provider.description: Updated provider name. Leave null to keep existing value.

endpointUrl.description: Updated API endpoint URL. Leave null to keep existing value.

description.description: Updated model description and capabilities. Leave null to keep existing value.
description.example: Updated with better performance and lower latency

status.description: Updated model status (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, DEPRECATED). Controls whether the model is available for use.

UpdateModelRequest.title: Update Model Request

ApiResponseModelResponse.description: Unified API response wrapper for all endpoints. Contains status information, message, optional data payload, and optional field-level validation errors.

timestamp.description: Server timestamp when the request was processed (ISO 8601 format)

status.description: HTTP status code of the response (200, 201, 400, 401, 403, 404, 409, 500, etc.)

success.description: Boolean indicator of request success. True for 2xx status codes, false for 4xx/5xx.

message.description: Human-readable message describing the response result or error. Provides context for the status code.

path.description: The request path/endpoint that was called (including query parameters if any)

method.description: HTTP method used for the request (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, etc.)

data.description: Generic data payload containing the actual response content. Type depends on the specific endpoint. Omitted from JSON if null.

errors.description: List of field-specific validation errors. Present only for validation-related errors. Omitted from JSON if null.

ApiResponseModelResponse.title: API Response

ModelResponse.description: Contains detailed information about a single AI model including configuration, pricing, and metadata.

modelId.description: Unique database identifier for the model

username.description: Unique identifier/slug for the model used in URLs

status.description: Current status

endpointUrl.description: API endpoint URL for the model

description.description: Description of model capabilities and features
description.example: MISTRAL's most capable model with advanced reasoning abilities

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the model was registered

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to model information

ModelResponse.title: Model Response

UpdateApiDocumentationRequest.description: Request to update existing API documentation. Both fields are optional; only provided fields will be updated.

title.description: Updated documentation title. Leave null to keep the existing title.

content.description: Updated documentation content with markdown support. Leave null to keep the existing content.
content.example: Updated documentation with new features and parameters

UpdateApiDocumentationRequest.title: Update API Documentation Request

ApiDocumentationResponse.description: Contains detailed API documentation for a specific model endpoint. Includes title, content, and metadata.

example.title: Chat Completions Endpoint
example.content: Handles real-time conversations with the model...

docId.description: Unique identifier for this documentation resource

content.description: Full documentation content with markdown formatting support. Includes code examples, parameters, request/response formats.
content.example: This endpoint handles real-time conversations with the model. Send a messages array containing conversation history...

modelId.description: Foreign key reference to the model this documentation belongs to

modelName.description: Display name of the associated model

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this documentation was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last documentation update

ApiDocumentationResponse.title: API Documentation Response

name.description: Unique human-readable name for the token

role.description: Role assigned to this service token

VerifyOtpRequest.description: Request to verify the one-time password sent to user's email. Completes the first step of the authentication process.

verificationId.description: The verification ID obtained from the RequestOtpResponse. Ties OTP verification to the initial OTP request.

otp.description: The six-digit OTP code sent to the user's email. Must match exactly including all digits.

VerifyOtpRequest.title: Verify OTP Request

ApiResponseVerifyOtpResponse.description: Unified API response wrapper for all endpoints. Contains status information, message, optional data payload, and optional field-level validation errors.

timestamp.description: Server timestamp when the request was processed (ISO 8601 format)

status.description: HTTP status code of the response (200, 201, 400, 401, 403, 404, 409, 500, etc.)

success.description: Boolean indicator of request success. True for 2xx status codes, false for 4xx/5xx.

ApiResponseVerifyOtpResponse.title: API Response

VerifyOtpResponse.description: Response confirming OTP verification result. If verified, contains a token for completing registration.

verificationId.description: The same verification ID. Used to link OTP verification with the final registration step.

message.description: Status message describing the verification result

verified.description: Boolean flag indicating whether OTP verification was successful

profileCompletionTtlMinutes.description: Time-to-live in minutes for completing profile setup. User must submit final registration before expiration.

VerifyOtpResponse.title: Verify OTP Response

RequestOtpRequest.description: Request to send a one-time password (OTP) to the specified email address. Initiated during registration process.

email.description: The email address where the OTP will be sent. Must be a valid, non-registered email address.

RequestOtpRequest.title: Request OTP Request

ApiResponseRequestOtpResponse.description: Unified API response wrapper for all endpoints. Contains status information, message, optional data payload, and optional field-level validation errors.

timestamp.description: Server timestamp when the request was processed (ISO 8601 format)

status.description: HTTP status code of the response (200, 201, 400, 401, 403, 404, 409, 500, etc.)

success.description: Boolean indicator of request success. True for 2xx status codes, false for 4xx/5xx.

message.description: Human-readable message describing the response result or error. Provides context for the status code.

errors.description: List of field-specific validation errors. Present only for validation-related errors. Omitted from JSON if null.

ApiResponseRequestOtpResponse.title: API Response

RequestOtpResponse.description: Response containing OTP verification details. Client should use verificationId for the next step in registration.

verificationId.description: Unique verification identifier used in next step to verify OTP. Required for OTP verification request.

message.description: Confirmation message indicating OTP was sent successfully

ttlMinutes.description: Time-to-live in minutes. OTP expires after this duration. User must verify before expiration.

RequestOtpResponse.title: Request OTP Response

FinalRegistrationRequest.description: Final step of user registration. Completes profile creation after OTP verification. Creates the user account with provided details.

verificationId.description: Verification token from OTP verification step. Proves user has verified their email.

fullName.description: User's full name (first and last name). Used for display and profile.

password.description: User's new account password. Must be at least 8 characters with mixed case, numbers, and special characters recommended.

confirmPassword.description: Password confirmation. Must exactly match the password field to prevent typos.

profileImage.description: Optional URL to user's profile image/avatar. Can be a local or external image URL.

emailSubscribed.description: Boolean flag indicating whether user wants to subscribe to email newsletters and product updates.

FinalRegistrationRequest.title: Final Registration Request

AuthResponse.description: Contains authentication tokens and token expiration information returned after successful login or token refresh.

accessToken.description: JWT access token for authenticated API requests. Include in Authorization header as Bearer token.

refreshToken.description: JWT refresh token used to obtain a new access token without re-authentication. Store securely.

expiresIn.description: Access token expiration time in seconds from the current time. After expiration, use refresh token to obtain a new access token.

AuthResponse.title: Authentication Response

RefreshTokenRequest.description: Request payload to refresh authentication tokens. Provides a valid refresh token to obtain a new access token.

refreshToken.description: The refresh token obtained from initial login. Used to obtain a new access token without re-entering credentials.

RefreshTokenRequest.title: Refresh Token Request

LoginRequest.description: Request payload for user authentication. Validates email format and ensures both fields are provided.

email.description: The user's registered email address used for login

password.description: The user's plain-text password (will be encrypted on server)

LoginRequest.title: Login Request

CreateApiKeyRequest.description: Request to create a new API key with specified rate limits. Used to generate credentials for programmatic API access.

description.description: A descriptive name for this API key (e.g., 'Production Server', 'Mobile App', 'Testing'). Helps identify the key's purpose.

dailyLimit.description: Maximum number of API requests allowed per day (UTC 00:00 to 23:59). Must be at least 1.

monthlyLimit.description: Maximum number of API requests allowed per calendar month. Must be at least 1 and typically higher than daily limit.

CreateApiKeyRequest.title: Create API Key Request

CreateModelRequest.description: Request to create a new AI model or language model in the system. Contains all required information for model registration and pricing configuration.

fullname.description: Display name of the model (e.g., 'MISTRAL-7B', 'Claude 3 Opus'). Should be user-friendly and descriptive.

username.description: Unique identifier/slug for the model used in URLs and references (lowercase, no spaces). Example: 'mistral7b', 'claude3'.)

provider.description: AI service provider (e.g., 'MISTRAL', 'Anthropic', 'Google', 'Meta'). Identifies the organization providing the model.

description.description: Detailed description of the model's capabilities, intended use cases, and special features.
description.example: MISTRAL's most capable model with advanced reasoning and coding abilities

type.description: Classification of the model type (LLM, Vision, Embedding, FineTuning, etc.). Determines the model's primary function.

CreateModelRequest.title: Create Model Request

CreateApiDocumentationRequest.description: Request to create new API documentation for a model. Includes title and detailed content describing API usage, parameters, and examples.

example.title: Chat Completions Endpoint
example.content: This endpoint handles chat-based conversations with the model. Accepts messages array and returns AI-generated response...

title.description: Title/heading for the documentation section (e.g., 'Chat Completions', 'Image Generation', 'Authentication')

content.description: Detailed documentation content. Can include markdown formatting, code examples, parameters, response formats, and usage instructions.
content.example: This endpoint handles chat-based conversations. Accepts a messages array containing conversation history. Returns streaming or complete responses with usage information.

CreateApiDocumentationRequest.title: Create API Documentation Request

RecordUsageRequest.description: Request payload for recording usage against a completed task. A single task may produce multiple usage records (e.g., input tokens + output tokens).

taskId.description: Task ID the usage belongs to

usageUnitType.description: Unit type being recorded (TOKENS, IMAGES, SECONDS, REQUESTS, etc.)

RecordUsageRequest.title: Record Usage Request

ratePerUnit.description: Rate per unit at recording time

CreateBillingConfigRequest.description: Request payload for creating a billing configuration for a model

modelId.description: ID of the model this billing config is for

pricingType.description: Type of pricing (PER_TOKEN, PER_IMAGE, PER_REQUEST, etc.)

pricingMetadata.description: JSON metadata containing rate details specific to the pricing type. For PER_TOKEN: {"inputRate": 0.00003, "outputRate": 0.00006}. For PER_IMAGE: {"rate": 0.01}. For PER_REQUEST: {"rate": 0.001}.

CreateBillingConfigRequest.title: Create Billing Config Request

TaskStatusUpdateRequest.description: Request payload for updating task status and optionally providing results

taskId.description: Unique task identifier (UUID) for the task to update

status.description: New status for the task

result.description: Optional result payload when marking task as completed. Contains model output, error details, or processing results.

usageMetadata.description: Raw provider response for audit and debugging

TaskStatusUpdateRequest.title: Task Status Update Request

TaskStatusResponse.description: Current status and result information for a specific task

status.description: Current status of the task

result.description: Task result payload. Contains model output when completed, error details when failed, or null when still processing.

TaskStatusResponse.title: Task Status Response

UpdateModelStatusRequest.description: Request to change the status of a model (activate, deactivate, deprecate). Optionally includes reason for the status change.

example.reason: Replaced by MISTRAL-7B Turbo with better performance

status.description: New status for the model. ACTIVE - model is available, INACTIVE - model is hidden, DEPRECATED - being phased out.

reason.description: Optional reason for the status change (e.g., 'Maintenance window', 'Deprecated in favor of V2', 'Cost optimization')
reason.example: Replaced by MISTRAL-7B Turbo with better performance

UpdateModelStatusRequest.title: Update Model Status Request
